message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant Frontend
participant Backend
database Database

frame Login {
    User ->> Frontend : Presses the "Login"-button
    activate Frontend
    
    Frontend ->> Backend : Request to open new window
    activate Backend
    
    Backend --> Frontend : Opens new window
    deactivate Backend
    
    User ->> Frontend : Enters login information
    User ->> Frontend : Presses "Confirm"-button
    
    Frontend ->> Backend : Request to validate input
    activate Backend
    
    alt Successful case [Validation successful]
        Backend -->> Frontend : Validation successful
        
        note over Frontend #90EE90:green\n:white:text:\nAllows user\nto proceed
        
        Frontend <-- User : Proceeds to next window
    else Failed validation [Validation failed]
        Backend -X Frontend : Validation failed
        
        note right of Frontend #FF6347:red\n:white:text:\nDisplays alert\nof type ERROR
        
        Frontend <- User : Lists up fields with errors
    end
    
    deactivate Backend
}

note bottom left: Cancel process if needed...

User ->> Frontend : Presses the "Cancel" button
Frontend ->> Backend : Close request received by backend system! 
Backend --> Frontend : Window closed successfully 

@enduml
